named-query.name: User.findUsersForAdmin
named-query.query: SELECT u FROM User u LEFT JOIN FETCH u.bannedBy WHERE (:search IS NULL OR u.fullName LIKE CONCAT('%', :search, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', :search, '%')) AND (:status IS NULL OR u.status = :status) ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC

named-native-query.name: User.countSignupsByDate
named-native-query.query: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(created_at, '+00:00', '+07:00')) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM user WHERE created_at >= :since GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt

named-query.name: Document.sumDownloadCountByOwnerUserId
named-query.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.downloadCount), 0) FROM Document d WHERE d.owner.userId = :userId

named-query.name: Document.findByOwnerUserIdOrVisibilityStatus
named-query.query: SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE (d.owner.userId = :userId OR d.visibilityStatus = :visibilityStatus) AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL

named-query.name: Document.findByVisibilityStatusAndRatingCountGreaterThanEqual
named-query.query: SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE d.visibilityStatus = :visibilityStatus AND d.ratingCount >= :minCount AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL

named-query.name: Document.findByVisibilityStatus
named-query.query: SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE d.visibilityStatus = :visibilityStatus AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL

named-query.name: Document.findByVisibilityStatusAndSimHashContentIsNotNull
named-query.query: SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE d.visibilityStatus = :visibilityStatus AND d.simHashContent IS NOT NULL AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL

named-query.name: Document.countDocumentsGroupBySubject
named-query.query: SELECT d.subject.subjectId, COUNT(d) FROM Document d WHERE d.uploadStatus = 'COMPLETED' AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY d.subject.subjectId ORDER BY COUNT(d) DESC

named-query.name: Document.findPopularDocuments
named-query.query: SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE d.uploadStatus = 'COMPLETED' AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY d.downloadCount DESC, d.ratingCount DESC, d.documentId ASC

named-query.name: Document.countActiveDocumentsGroupByOwnerIds
named-query.query: SELECT d.owner.userId, COUNT(d) FROM Document d WHERE d.owner.userId IN :ids AND d.uploadStatus = 'COMPLETED' AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY d.owner.userId

named-query.name: Document.sumFileSizeOfActiveDocuments
named-query.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.fileSize), 0) FROM Document d WHERE d.uploadStatus = 'COMPLETED' AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL

named-query.name: Document.countActiveDocumentsGroupByFileType
named-query.query: SELECT d.fileType, COUNT(d) FROM Document d WHERE d.uploadStatus = 'COMPLETED' AND d.moderationStatus = 'NORMAL' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY d.fileType

named-native-query.name: Document.countNewDocumentsByDate
named-native-query.query: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(created_at, '+00:00', '+07:00')) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM document WHERE created_at >= :since AND upload_status='COMPLETED' AND moderation_status='NORMAL' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt

named-query.name: Download.countDownloadsReceivedGroupByOwnerIds
named-query.query: SELECT d.document.owner.userId, COUNT(d) FROM Download d WHERE d.document.owner.userId IN :ids GROUP BY d.document.owner.userId

named-native-query.name: Download.countDownloadsByDate
named-native-query.query: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(downloaded_at, '+00:00', '+07:00')) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM download WHERE downloaded_at >= :since GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt

named-native-query.name: ChatMessage.countAiQueriesByDate
named-native-query.query: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(created_at, '+00:00', '+07:00')) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM chat_message WHERE sender_type = 'USER' AND created_at >= :since GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
